Prof. Dr. Mary Louise Şimşek’s “Abortion: Social Media Discourses in Türkiye and Bulgaria” Project Received TÜBİTAK Support

The project titled “#abortion: Social Media Discourses on Abortion in Turkey and Bulgaria” by Prof. Dr. Mary Louise Şimşek, one of our academicians in the Department of Political Science and International Relations, has been awarded support within the scope of the TÜBİTAK Turkey-Bulgaria Bilateral Cooperation Program.
